creator: gnieder@gmx.de
text:
...perhaps, but if so, it looks like only very few people are using such 
an "old" chipset - nobody except us seem to have such problems. :-((

I think this fault is still ignored by FreeBSD development.

-Wanninger

Michiel van Dijk schrieb:
> Looks like there is a serious problem with the BX/ZX chipset. I have the same problem on a MSI main board. FreeBSD 6.3 works fine, 7.0 doesn't. 
>
